These are interactive stdin-reading functions. Test using the non_interactive=true path (which uses defaults/errors rather than reading stdin). For the interactive path, mock stdin by providing a custom reader or testing the validation/formatting logic in isolation.
Add tests for interactive_prompts.rs prompt methods
